segments.text: Trying to go for that up air that he needs, like, right now.
Trying to catch a jump as there into the up smash.
Had to show it's not going to work out.
Lui$ on the chase, on the prowl.
Trying to catch a jump as well.
But finally, the second one does.

full_text: Trying to go for that up air that he needs, like, right now. Trying to catch a jump as there into the up smash. Had to show it's not going to work out. Lui$ on the chase, on the prowl. Down tilt doesn't connect. Trying to catch a jump as well. But finally, the second one does.
